name: Long Island Iced Tea
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Fresh lemon juice; or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill a mixing glass with ice.
2. Add the liquors and lemon juice (but not the cola) to the mixing glass.
3. Shake well.
4. Strain into a collins glass filled with ice cubes.
5. Top off with cola.
6. Garnish with a slice of lemon and a sprig of mint.
7. Serve with a straw.
